product_overview: Value Fabric is an enterprise agentic SaaS platform that helps users transform enterprise data into structured knowledge, ROI analyses, business cases, and executive-facing deliverables. The app combines account-based workspaces, intelligence analysis, calculators, governance, and workflow tools in a multi-layer semantic pipeline.
core_goals: Sign in and access the workspace
Analyze account intelligence across signals, stakeholders, ontology matches, and enrichment
Model value through driver trees, ROI calculations, and value cases
Build and review business case deliverables for different audiences
Manage formulas, ontology concepts, ingestion jobs, and agent workflows
Track governance evidence, decision traces, notifications, and collaboration activity
Use guided workflows to move a prospect from setup through value case generation

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign in to the platform using SSO or the development email/password flow and reach the authenticated workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Choose a sign-in method -> Complete the sign-in process -> See the authenticated workspace
Navigate to /signup -> Enter registration details -> Submit the registration form -> See the next authentication step
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password in development mode -> Submit the login form -> See the home page
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an authentication error message

features.name: Account Management
features.description: Lets users browse, search, select, and create enterprise accounts that serve as the starting point for account-scoped work.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts -> View the account list -> Search or filter accounts -> Select an account -> Enter the account workspace
Navigate to /accounts -> Review the account list -> Create a new account -> See the new account appear in the list

features.name: Intelligence Workspace
features.description: Provides account-scoped intelligence tabs for reviewing signals, stakeholders, ontology matching, and data enrichment.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts -> Select an account -> Open the signals view -> Review account signals and insights -> Move to stakeholder analysis -> Review the stakeholder map -> Open ontology matching -> Review matched concepts -> Open enrichment -> Review enriched account data

features.name: Driver Tree
features.description: Shows an interactive hierarchy of value drivers so users can inspect and refine the business impact model for an account.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts -> Select an account -> Open the driver tree view -> Review the driver hierarchy -> Expand and collapse driver nodes -> Edit driver values -> See the updated model reflected in the tree

features.name: ROI Calculator
features.description: Lets users configure financial assumptions and evaluate ROI and value model outcomes for an account.
user_flows: Navigate to /accounts -> Select an account -> Open the ROI calculator -> Enter financial inputs -> Review calculated ROI results -> Adjust model parameters -> See updated calculations
Navigate to /accounts -> Select an account -> Open the ROI calculator -> Switch to the value model view -> Review the value model outputs -> Compare the modeled outcomes

features.name: Business Cases
features.description: Enables users to browse business cases, open a case, and review it in CFO, executive, or technical views.
user_flows: Navigate to /deliverables/cases -> View the business case list -> Open a business case -> Review the case details
Navigate to /deliverables/cases -> Open a business case -> Switch between CFO, executive, and technical views -> Review the case from each perspective
Navigate to /deliverables/cases -> Open a business case -> Interact with the case content -> Review the updated presentation

features.name: Formula Builder
features.description: Provides tools to create, edit, and simulate value formulas used in calculations and scenarios.
user_flows: Navigate to /context/formulas -> View the formula list -> Create a new formula -> Define the formula expression -> Manage dependencies -> Run a scenario simulation -> Review the results
Navigate to /context/formulas -> Open an existing formula -> Edit the formula expression -> Update dependencies -> Save the changes -> See the formula updated in the list

features.name: Ontology Editor
features.description: Lets users browse ontology entities, inspect entity details, and explore relationships in the ontology graph.
user_flows: Navigate to /context/ontology -> Browse ontology entities -> Open an entity detail view -> Review the entity information -> Return to the entity list
Navigate to /context/ontology -> Search ontology concepts -> Open the graph explorer -> Review relationships between entities -> Explore connected concepts

features.name: Prospect Setup Workflow
features.description: Guides users through a multi-step prospect setup process that progresses from intake to intelligence, modeling, evidence, calculation, and value case creation.
user_flows: Navigate to /workflow/prospect -> Fill in prospect information -> Continue to intelligence review -> Review intelligence insights -> Configure the AI model -> Build the driver tree -> Collect evidence -> Run calculations -> Generate the value case
Navigate to /workflow/prospect -> Fill in prospect information -> Advance through each workflow step -> Review each completed step -> Finish with a generated value case

features.name: Governance and Audit
features.description: Allows users to review decision traces, evidence, audit history, compliance-related records, and approval activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /governance/traces -> Review decision traces -> Inspect supporting evidence -> Check audit-related records -> Return to the governance overview
Navigate to /governance/evidence -> Review governance evidence -> Inspect the evidence set -> Compare records across items -> Return to governance views

features.name: Ingestion and Extraction
features.description: Supports monitoring ingestion jobs and running extraction processes that populate the knowledge and ontology layers.
user_flows: Navigate to /context/ingestion/jobs -> View ingestion job list -> Check job status and logs -> Start a new ingestion run -> Review the updated job entry
Navigate to /context/extraction -> Review extraction status -> Configure extraction parameters -> Trigger an extraction run -> Review the extraction results

features.name: Agent Workflows
features.description: Lets users view, configure, and monitor AI agent workflows used for autonomous value research and analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /context/agents -> View the agent workflow list -> Configure agent parameters -> Start or update a workflow -> Review the execution status -> Inspect the generated outputs

routes.description: OIDC login page with SSO and dev email/password
OIDC callback handler for JWT exchange

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: OIDC-based login with Google/Apple SSO and dev email/password fallback. Handles callback, JWT storage, and role sync.
user_interactions: Enter email and password in dev mode
View error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Account Management
features.description: Create, list, and manage enterprise accounts/prospects. Entry point for workspace navigation.
user_interactions: Click account to select and navigate to workspace
Create new account via prospect setup

features.name: Intelligence Workspace
features.description: Multi-tab workspace for signals, stakeholders, ontology matching, and enrichment per account.

features.name: Driver Tree
features.description: Interactive driver tree visualization for value drivers and business impact modeling.

features.name: ROI Calculator
features.description: Calculate and visualize ROI with configurable inputs and scenario modeling.
user_interactions: Switch between ROI and Value Model tabs

features.name: Business Cases
features.description: Create, view, and manage business case deliverables with multiple view modes.
user_interactions: Switch between CFO, Executive, and Technical views

features.name: Formula Builder
features.description: Build and edit value calculation formulas with dependency and scenario management.

features.name: Ontology Editor
features.description: Browse and manage ontology entities, relationships, and graph visualization.

features.name: Prospect Setup Workflow
features.description: Multi-step wizard for setting up new account prospects from initial intake to value case.

features.name: Governance and Audit
features.description: Decision trace logging, evidence management, compliance monitoring, and audit trails.

features.name: Ingestion and Extraction
features.description: Monitor data ingestion jobs and run extraction engines for knowledge graph population.

features.name: Agent Workflows
features.description: Configure and monitor AI agent workflows for autonomous value research and analysis.

known_limitations.issue: Many workspace pages require an active account selection; accessing /intelligence or /drivers without a selected account will redirect to /accounts
known_limitations.impact: Requires account context before testing workspace features

known_limitations.issue: Some context engine pages require advanced or admin tier (requiredTier="advanced" or requiredTier="admin")
known_limitations.impact: Must authenticate with appropriate role to access settings and advanced features

known_limitations.issue: Dev auth bypass may be active in local development (DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true)
known_limitations.impact: Local testing may bypass actual OIDC flow
